Our Mission

Why We Show Up Every Week

Every person deserves a warm meal and a kind face. Brown Bag Lunches is built on that belief.

🍞

Fight Food Insecurity

We prepare and distribute nutritious brown bag lunches and hearty meals — sandwiches, spaghetti, and more — to those who need it most.

🤝

Build Community

Through strategic partnerships with Publix, Farm Share, and local organizations, we multiply our impact and bring neighbors together.

💛

Restore Dignity

We believe that every smile we return to a face is a victory. We serve with warmth, compassion, and unconditional love.

Get Involved Today

Ready to Make a Difference?

Join our family of volunteers or contribute a donation — every act of generosity feeds a soul and changes a life.

Our Story

Meet the Founder

Deneen Boston

Founder & Executive Director

Deneen Boston is an educator and community leader with a lifelong passion for service and a deep-rooted belief in the power of a simple, nutritious meal. Driven by the joy of seeing a smile return to someone's face, Deneen founded Brown Bag Lunches in 2000 to address food insecurity and provide hope to those experiencing homelessness.

What began as a personal mission to hand out sandwiches and hearty spaghetti meals has grown into a flourishing ministry. Deneen's vision is fueled by the personal fulfillment that comes from knowing a neighbor is no longer hungry.

Between 2000 and 2024, Deneen worked tirelessly to broaden Brown Bag Lunches's reach, building strategic partnerships with local organizations and community pillars like Publix and Farm Share. Thanks to these collaborations, 2024 marked a major turning point for the ministry, allowing the organization to expand its impact and serve more individuals than ever before.

Today, Deneen continues to lead Brown Bag Lunches with the same hands-on approach she started with, ensuring that every meal served is a step toward a stronger, more compassionate community.

Helping others makes me feel good inside — and that feeling is the heartbeat of everything we do.
— Deneen Boston

Community Partners

🛒 Publix 🌾 Farm Share 🏘️ Local Organizations
Our Journey

From One Bag to a Movement

2000
Founded

Deneen begins distributing sandwiches and spaghetti meals to neighbors in need — fueled by faith and compassion.

2010s
Growth Phase

The ministry grows through word of mouth, adding volunteers and expanding distribution to new locations.

2024
Major Milestone

Partnerships with Publix and Farm Share launch a turning point — more meals, more reach, more lives changed than ever before.

Get Involved

Volunteer with Us

Your time and energy can change someone's day. Join our growing team of compassionate volunteers and make a tangible difference in your community.

🥪

Meal Preparation

Help assemble brown bag lunches, sandwiches, and warm meals before distribution events.

🚗

Food Distribution

Join our street teams to hand out meals and connect face-to-face with community members.

📦

Food Sorting

Assist with sorting and organizing food donations from partners like Farm Share and Publix.

📢

Outreach & Events

Help spread the word at community events, churches, and schools to grow our impact.

💻

Administrative Help

Support us with data entry, social media, photography, or communications from home.

🌟

Youth Programs

Help inspire the next generation of community servants through mentorship and education.
